title: Asher III

'''Asher III''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="SS" /> located in the [[Asher system/Legends|Asher system]], a part of the [[Sprizen sector/Legends|Sprizen sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained a [[Rebel cell (Asher III)|cell]] on Asher III. When the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Delt Nerris]], who was sympathetic to the Alliance, hijacked the [[Corellian Security Force]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|starship]] ''[[Nova Whisper]]'', the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was turned over to the Rebels. The Alliance cell on Asher III subsequently used ''Nova Whisper'' as a [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical transport]].<ref name="SS" />

Shortly before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="SS" /> of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] [[Lernik De'Yago]] attempted to [[Merchant/Legends|sell]] a shipment of weapons to the Alliance on Asher III. However, before De'Yago could receive his payment, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] tracked down the Asher III cell and moved to [[Destruction of Asher III Rebel cell|destroy]] the Rebel presence there. The Empire seized De'Yago's shipment and eliminated most of the Rebel presence on Asher III, while De'Yago [[Thief/Legends|stole]] the ''Nova Whisper'' and used it to escape the celestial body.<ref name="SS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Asher III was mentioned in ''[[Stock Ships]]'', a [[1997]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="SS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Asher [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Asher III, in grid square N-5.<ref name="TEA" />
